basics.name: Yaé Ulrich Gaba
basics.label: Topologist · Data Scientist · AI Consultant
basics.summary: Topologist, Data Scientist, and AI Consultant based in Kigali, Rwanda. Research Associate at Quantum Leap Africa and AIMS RIC, with expertise in asymmetric topology, TDA, geometric deep learning, and reinforcement learning.

work.name: Quantum Leap Africa (QLA)
work.summary: Research at the intersection of topology, data science, and quantum computing.
highlights: Topological methods in machine learning and data analysis
Workshop on Computational Topology & Quantum Computing (WoComToQC) organizer

work.name: AIMS Research & Innovation Center (AIMS RIC)
highlights: Research in applied topology and machine learning
Mentoring African graduate students in mathematical sciences

work.name: AIRINA Labs / AI.Technipreneurs
highlights: AI research and innovation for the African continent

work.name: Sefako Makgatho Health Sciences University (SMU)
highlights: Collaborative research in topology and data science
Research on asymmetric topology and fixed point theory in generalized metric spaces
Thesis: Construction of Quasi-Metrics Determined by Orders
Advanced studies in topology and analysis

education.institution: IMSP (Institut de Mathématiques et de Sciences Physiques)
highlights: Foundation in pure mathematics and mathematical physics

publications.name: The Shape of Data: Geometry-Based Machine Learning and Data Analysis in R
publications.summary: A comprehensive guide to geometry-based machine learning, covering TDA and geometric methods with practical R implementations.

publications.name: Topological Foundations of Reinforcement Learning
publications.summary: Exploring topological structures underlying RL state, action, and policy spaces through algebraic topology.

publications.name: Bellman Operator Convergence Enhancements in Reinforcement Learning Algorithms
publications.summary: Mathematical foundations for RL via Banach fixed-point theorem and alternative Bellman operator formulations.

projects.name: Workshop on Computational Topology & Quantum Computing (WoComToQC)
projects.summary: Interdisciplinary workshop bringing together researchers in computational topology and quantum computing.

projects.name: The Shape of Data
projects.summary: Co-authored book on geometry-based machine learning published by No Starch Press.
